modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about the NOW function in Excel

full_description_text:  
I was trying to figure out what the NOW function in Excel is. I heard it does something with time, but I'm not really sure how to use it. I just want to know what it does and if it can help me with my spreadsheets.
short_description: Confusion about the NOW function in Excel
description: I was trying to figure out what the NOW function in Excel is. I heard it does something with time, but I'm not really sure how to use it. I just want to know what it does and if it can help me with my spreadsheets.
